user.description:
Please enter the serial number and the Service Code of your BLANCO device.
Make sure that the RCA (secure connection link) has been activated beforehand in the UNIT app under Settings → Smart Home.

data_description.serial: The serial number of your BLANCO device, found on the device label (e.g. 123456789012).
data_description.service_code: The Service Code shown in the BLANCO UNIT app under Settings → Smart Home.

reauth_confirm.description: Re-enter the Service Code for your BLANCO device ({serial}) to restore the connection.

reconfigure.description: Update the credentials for your BLANCO device. The serial number must match the existing entry.

error.access_not_granted: Invalid authentication. Please grant access via the BLANCO UNIT app and try again. You must be within Bluetooth range of the device to grant access.
error.device_type_not_supported: This device type is currently not supported for smart home applications.
error.serial_mismatch: The serial number does not match the existing device. Please enter the original serial number.

device_error.title: BLANCO device reports an error
device_error.description: The device **{device_name}** reports {error_count} active error(s). Please check the device or the BLANCO UNIT app.
